languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through augmetics, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

languages.text: "Я посвятил свою жизнь множеству вопросов — благам слияния органики и машины, поиску ценности в их раздельном бытии, возможности продления функционирования плоти путями генетики и алхимии. Бог-Машина совершенен во всех своих проявлениях — это истина и неопровержимый факт. Но мне кажется, что попытки уподобиться Ему исключительно через {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}аугментику{/g}, пусть и благие в своей праведности, но не до конца отражают Его замысел. Ведь органическое тело — не что иное, как биологическая машина, чьи части можно заменять и улучшать путем генетической трансмутации".

"I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. languages.text: «He dedicado mi vida a muchas cuestiones: las bendiciones de la fusión de lo orgánico y lo mecánico, la búsqueda de la virtud en su existencia independiente, la posibilidad de prolongar la funcionalidad de la carne mediante genética y alquimia... El Dios Máquina es perfecto en todas Sus manifestaciones: esa es la verdad y un hecho irrefutable. Pero, en mi opinión, el intento de asemejarse a Él exclusivamente mediante el uso de {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}auméticos{/g}, aunque justo, no refleja correctamente Su diseño, pues el cuerpo orgánico no es más que una máquina biológica cuyos componentes pueden reemplazarse y mejorarse a través de la transmutación genética».
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

Pero, en mi opinión, el intento de asemejarse a Él exclusivamente mediante el uso de {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}auméticos{/g}, aunque justo, no refleja correctamente Su diseño, pues el cuerpo orgánico no es más que una máquina biológica cuyos componentes pueden reemplazarse y mejorarse a través de la transmutación genética».

languages.text: “我一生都在追寻各种问题：比如有机体与机械融合的赐福、两者独立存在的价值，以及通过基因与炼金术延长血肉机能的可能性。万机之神在其一切显化中皆为完美，这是真理，也是不争的事实。但在我看来，仅仅通过{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}去模仿祂，虽然虔诚可嘉，却不能完全体现祂的设计。毕竟有机身体不过是一台生物机器，它的零件完全可以通过基因改造来替换和升级。”
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

traits.locale_text: “我一生都在追寻各种问题：比如有机体与机械融合的赐福、两者独立存在的价值，以及通过基因与炼金术延长血肉机能的可能性。万机之神在其一切显化中皆为完美，这是真理，也是不争的事实。但在我看来，仅仅通过{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}植入物{/g}去模仿祂，虽然虔诚可嘉，却不能完全体现祂的设计。毕竟有机身体不过是一台生物机器，它的零件完全可以通过基因改造来替换和升级。”

languages.text: « J'ai voué ma vie à de nombreuses questions : les bénédictions de la fusion entre matières organiques et machines ; la quête de la vertu dans leur existence distincte ; la possibilité de prolonger le fonctionnement de la chair via la génétique et l'alchimie. Le Dieu-Machine est parfait dans toutes Ses manifestations, c'est un fait aussi avéré qu'irréfutable. Mais j'estime que chercher à Lui ressembler par l'ajout d'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmétiques{/g} n'est pas digne de Ses desseins, même si le souhait est compréhensible et légitime. Après tout, le corps organique n'est rien de plus qu'une machine biologique dont les pièces peuvent être remplacées et améliorées par transmutation génétique. »
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai voué ma vie à de nombreuses questions : les bénédictions de la fusion entre matières organiques et machines ; la quête de la vertu dans leur existence distincte ; la possibilité de prolonger le fonctionnement de la chair via la génétique et l'alchimie. Le Dieu-Machine est parfait dans toutes Ses manifestations, c'est un fait aussi avéré qu'irréfutable. Mais j'estime que chercher à Lui ressembler par l'ajout d'{g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmétiques{/g} n'est pas digne de Ses desseins, même si le souhait est compréhensible et légitime. Après tout, le corps organique n'est rien de plus qu'une machine biologique dont les pièces peuvent être remplacées et améliorées par transmutation génétique. »

languages.text: "Ich habe mein Leben vielen Fragen gewidmet ... dem Segen der Fusion organischer Wesen mit Maschinen, der Suche nach Tugend in ihrer unabhängigen Existenz, die Möglichkeit Fleisch mittels Genetik und Alchemie länger funktionsfähig zu halten. Der Maschinengott ist perfekt in allen Seinen Manifestationen ... das ist die Wahrheit und eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Aber mir scheint, dass der Versuch, allein mit {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} wie Er zu werden, bei aller Rechtschaffenheit Seinen Plan nicht vollständig wiedergibt. Immerhin ist der organische Körper nichts weiter als eine biologische Maschine, deren Komponenten ersetzt und mittels genetischer Transmutation verbessert werden können.
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

Der Maschinengott ist perfekt in allen Seinen Manifestationen ... das ist die Wahrheit und eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Aber mir scheint, dass der Versuch, allein mit {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}Augmentationen{/g} wie Er zu werden, bei aller Rechtschaffenheit Seinen Plan nicht vollständig wiedergibt. Immerhin ist der organische Körper nichts weiter als eine biologische Maschine, deren Komponenten ersetzt und mittels genetischer Transmutation verbessert werden können.

languages.text: 「有機体と機械の融合の恩恵、両者の別個の存在における美徳の探求、遺伝学と錬金術による肉体の機能延長の可能性。機械神はそのすべての顕現において完全である。これは真実であり、揺るぎない事実である。しかし、オーグメティックによってのみ神のようになろうとする試みは、その正しさにおいては良いものであっても、神のデザインを完全に反映したものではないように私には思える。というのも、有機的な身体は生物学的な機械にすぎず、その構成要素は遺伝子の変換によって置き換えられ、改良されるからである。」
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."

traits.locale_text: 「有機体と機械の融合の恩恵、両者の別個の存在における美徳の探求、遺伝学と錬金術による肉体の機能延長の可能性。機械神はそのすべての顕現において完全である。これは真実であり、揺るぎない事実である。しかし、オーグメティックによってのみ神のようになろうとする試みは、その正しさにおいては良いものであっても、神のデザインを完全に反映したものではないように私には思える。というのも、有機的な身体は生物学的な機械にすぎず、その構成要素は遺伝子の変換によって置き換えられ、改良されるからである。」

languages.text: "Hayatımı pek çok soruya adadım. Organiklerin ve makinelerin birleşiminin lütufları, ayrı varoluşlarında erdem arayışı, genetik ve simya yoluyla etin işleyişinin uzatılması olasılığı. Makine Tanrı, tüm tezahürlerinde mükemmeldir. Bu, gerçek ve yadsınamaz bir olgudur. Ancak bana öyle geliyor ki O'na yalnızca {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}ogmetikler{/g} aracılığıyla benzeme girişimleri, erdemli olsalar da O'nun tasarımını tam olarak yansıtmıyor. Çünkü organik beden, bileşenleri genetik dönüştürmeyle değiştirilebilen ve geliştirilebilen biyolojik bir makineden farksızdır."
languages.original_text: "I have dedicated my life to many questions — the blessings of the fusion of organics and machines, the search for virtue in their separate existence, the possibility of prolonging the functioning of flesh through genetics and alchemy. The Machine God is perfect in all His manifestations — this is the truth and an incontrovertible fact. But it seems to me that attempts to become like Him exclusively through {g|Encyclopedia:AugmentationGlossary}augmetics{/g}, though good in their righteousness, do not fully reflect His design. For the organic body is nothing but a biological machine whose components can be replaced and improved by genetic transmutation."
